emails.subject: Invoice INV-2026-0001 – May Office Supplies
emails.preview: Please find attached our invoice for May 2026 office supply delivery.
emails.body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached our invoice #INV-2026-0001 for office supplies and IT equipment delivered in May 2026.

Total Amount: USD 1,842.50
Due Date: June 11, 2026

Kindly process payment at your earliest convenience. For any queries, please contact our billing department.

Best regards,
Northwind Office Supplies Billing Team

emails.subject: Invoice INV-2026-0002 – April Professional Services
emails.preview: Attached is our invoice for consulting services rendered in April 2026.
emails.body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find enclosed invoice #INV-2026-0002 for professional services and travel expenses incurred during our April 2026 engagement.

Total Amount: USD 7,350.00
Due Date: June 8, 2026

Payment terms: Net 30. Please reference the invoice number when making payment.

Thank you for your continued business.

Best regards,
Globex Consulting – Finance Department

emails.subject: Invoice INV-2026-0003 – Shipping & Freight Services
emails.preview: Attached shipping invoice for freight services completed in May 2026.
emails.body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0003 covering domestic freight and express courier services provided in May 2026.

Total Amount: USD 2,480.00
Due Date: June 13, 2026

Please ensure payment is made by the due date to avoid late fees. Contact us at billing@cascade-logistics.com if you have any questions.

Thank you,
Cascade Logistics – Accounts Receivable
